⚔ Most Battles

Battle Rules

  1. Benance PvP can only be played using the Keplr Wallet Extension (available on mobile and desktop).
  2. This is a last-survivor game — the player who survives the longest wins the match.
  3. Each battle is strictly 1 vs 1 between the Creator and the Challenger.
  4. After creating a battle card, the Creator must join the battle room. If the Creator is not present when the battle starts, it will be counted as a loss.
  5. Once a Challenger deposit & joins a battle room, leaving the room will be counted as a loss.
  6. Benance is not responsible for any losses. Please play responsibly and only bet what you can afford to lose.
  7. 10% of the total pot (2× bet) is allocated to the Benance DAO Treasury.

Battle has been canceled


Transaction

⚠ Do not leave or refresh the page during countdown & battle. Leaving will count as a loss.
